# Show references to a type.
exec gorelo refs Server
stdout 'Server.*type.*server\.go'
stdout 'main\.go'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/test

go 1.21
-- server.go --
package main

type Server struct{}

func NewServer() *Server { return &Server{} }
-- main.go --
package main

var s Server

func main() {
	_ = s
}
